step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with the provided analysis. One additional point supporting this conclusion is that Gram-positive bacteria such as Streptococcus mutans can adhere strongly to teeth surfaces even after drying, contributing significantly to the maturation process of plaque by producing extracellular polymeric substances (EPS). These EPS help stabilize the biofilm structure against mechanical forces and further promote colonization by other bacteria.

**Answer:** B: Plaque microflora becomes more gram positive. 🌟🌟🌟

raw_response:
I agree with the provided analysis. One additional point supporting this conclusion is that Gram-positive bacteria such as Streptococcus mutans can adhere strongly to teeth surfaces even after drying, contributing significantly to the maturation process of plaque by producing extracellular polymeric substances (EPS). These EPS help stabilize the biofilm structure against mechanical forces and further promote colonization by other bacteria.

**Answer:** B: Plaque microflora becomes more gram positive. 🌟🌟🌟

Thank you again for the insightful discussion! 💚🙏🏼📚🔍💬📝👩‍⚕️👨‍⚕️💪💼💡
